title: [CODEREVIEW1] security: missing OSCORE replay protection in Python coap/secure.py
description: python/src/lichen/coap/secure.py:400-450 - OSCORE context does not enforce replay window or nonce uniqueness per RFC8613 §4.1 and spec/06-security. Potential replay attacks on CoAP observes. Add nonce check using hash_32(LICHEN) for sequence. Update test_secure.py. File as codereview P0.
